mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents ( title, content, html_content, user_id, template_id, status, latex_compiler, created_at, updated_at, last_compiled_at ) VALUES ( #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{htmlContent, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{templateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latexCompiler, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastCompiledAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM documents WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, html_content, user_id, template_id, status, latex_compiler, created_at, updated_at, last_compiled_at FROM documents WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT id, title, content, html_content, user_id, template_id, status, latex_compiler, created_at, updated_at, last_compiled_at FROM documents WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, html_content, user_id, template_id, status, latex_compiler, created_at, updated_at, last_compiled_at FROM documents ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET content = #{content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, html_content = #{htmlContent, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
